subject: Confirming almond horn cookies for Dec 8
snippet: Hi Kim, confirming my Typeform order for a box of 24 almond horn cookies pickup Dec 8 3pm to 4pm. Thanks.
body: Hi Kim, just confirming the Typeform I sent for a box of 24 almond horn cookies pickup Dec 8 between 3pm and 4pm at your usual pickup spot. Order KIRUS-2026-1119. Let me know if that window still works for you. Thanks. Rebecca

subject: Typeform submitted chocolate babka plus Kwanzaa cookies
snippet: Placed the order through the Typeform, pickup Dec 8 4pm. Thanks Kim.
body: Hi Kim, I just filled out the Typeform for a chocolate babka plus a box of Kwanzaa cookies. Pickup Dec 8 4pm to 5pm. I saw a confirmation number KIRUS-2026-1128 come back. Thank you. Emily

subject: Sorry think that Typeform double submitted
snippet: Hi Kim, I refreshed and got another confirmation number, please treat only one as the real order.
body: Hi Kim, I refreshed the Typeform confirmation page and now I have two numbers KIRUS-2026-1128 and KIRUS-2026-1131 for the same babka and Kwanzaa cookie order. Please treat only one as the real order. Same pickup Dec 8 4pm to 5pm. Sorry for the noise. Emily

subject: Dec 5 no extra afternoon drop we are set
snippet: Hi Kim, we do not need the Sat Dec 5 afternoon delivery buffer we had penciled. Standing rhythm is fine, no extra drop needed.
body: Hi Kim, quick note on the Dec 5 Saturday afternoon delivery window we had penciled in weeks back. We do not need it. Standing rhythm through the week is fine, no extra Saturday drop needed. Cafe stays covered through our Wed and Fri deliveries. Please clear whatever hold was on that Saturday. Thanks. Tatiana Cafe Nostalgia

subject: Add 2 rugelach on Dec 9 and Dec 11
snippet: Sami here, please add 2 dozen rugelach on top of standing for Dec 9 and Dec 11 deliveries.
body: Kim, Sami at Heritage. Please add 2 dozen extra rugelach on top of our standing on the Dec 9 Wed and the Dec 11 Fri delivery. Same wholesale price. Confirmed with Marisol here. Standing else unchanged. Thanks.

subject: Cancelling Yule log order KIRUS-2026-1122
snippet: Kim, I have to cancel the chestnut Yule log for Dec 5. Sorry for the short notice.
body: Kim, I am so sorry, I have to cancel the chocolate chestnut Yule log I ordered for Dec 5 pickup. KIRUS-2026-1122. Family situation shifted. I know it is short notice, please let me know if there is a cancellation fee or anything owed. Rachel

subject: Add 6 cranberry orange loaves on Dec 9 only
snippet: Anya here, please add 6 cranberry orange loaves on the Dec 9 Wed delivery only, holiday floor push.
body: Hi Kim, Anya at Brownstone. Please add 6 additional cranberry orange loaves on the Dec 9 Wed delivery only for a holiday floor push. Standing else unchanged, Dec 11 Fri is normal. Same wholesale unit price. Confirmed with Terrence. Thanks.

subject: New order chocolate chestnut Yule log Dec 11 pickup
snippet: Hi Kim, please add me for one chocolate chestnut Yule log Dec 11 4pm to 5pm pickup. Confirming price 115.
body: Hi Kim, one of my neighbors just picked up your babka trio and told me to reach out. Please put me down for one chocolate chestnut Yule log pickup Dec 11 between 4pm and 5pm. Confirming price 115. I do not have a Typeform reference, this is fresh. Order number if you can send back one. Thanks. Jordan Franklin

subject: Yule log Dec 11 pickup got you order number attached
snippet: Confirmed Yule log Dec 11 4pm to 5pm pickup order KIRUS-2026-1141 price 115. See you then.
body: Hi Jordan, confirmed. One chocolate chestnut Yule log pickup Dec 11 between 4pm and 5pm. Order number KIRUS-2026-1141 price 115. Payment on pickup. See you then. Kim

subject: Rush ingredient quote for Dec 3 delivery
snippet: Quote attached, 625.40 total, needs confirmation by Dec 2 for Dec 3 rush delivery.
body: Kim, per your call this morning attached is the rush quote for bulk unsalted butter, bread flour, and spice restock, rush delivery Dec 3. Total 625.40 all in. We need your confirmation by end of day Dec 2 to lock the rush window. Reply with a yes and we will send an invoice. Sales team, Restaurant Depot

subject: Question about Dec 12 showcase seating
snippet: Hi Kim, will there be reserved seating for families at the Dec 12 showcase or is it open seating? Just want to plan arrival time. Thank you. Lauren
body: Hi Kim, quick question about the Winter Showcase on Dec 12. Will there be reserved seating for families or is it open seating? We would love to sit close for photos. What time do doors open? Thank you so much. Lauren Brooks

subject: Ava out sick this week
snippet: Hi Kim, Ava has a bad cold and will miss classes this week. She should be back for the Dec 5 rehearsal. Sorry for the notice.
body: Hi Kim, letting you know Ava has a bad cold and will miss her classes this week. We are hoping she is back and rested for the Dec 5 dress rehearsal. Please let me know if she needs to catch up on anything. Thanks. Dana

subject: Thank you for a wonderful term
snippet: Kim, just wanted to say thank you for everything this term. Sofia loves your classes.
body: Kim, just wanted to say thank you for everything this term. Sofia comes home from every class glowing and cannot stop talking about the showcase. We appreciate you and the whole team. See you Dec 12. Miguel

subject: Carpool for rehearsal week
snippet: Hi Kim, a few of us are coordinating carpools for the Dec 1 to 4 rehearsal evenings, anything we should know about pickup times?
body: Hi Kim, a few of the L2 families are coordinating carpools for the Dec 1 to 4 rehearsal evenings. Is the 7 30 pm end time firm so we can plan pickups? Happy to share the list with the front desk. Thank you. Priscilla

subject: Costume return after showcase
snippet: Hi Kim, when and where do we return costumes after the Dec 12 performance?
body: Hi Kim, could you remind us when and where costumes should be returned after the Dec 12 performance? Is it right after load out or the following week? Want to make sure we do not hold anything up. Thanks. Hannah

subject: Any holiday pickup slots left
snippet: Hi Kim, a friend recommended you, do you still have any holiday custom pickup slots the week of Dec 8? No rush.
body: Hi Kim, a friend recommended your babka and pies. Do you still have any holiday custom pickup slots the week of Dec 8? I have not filled out a Typeform yet, just checking availability first. Whatever works for you. Thank you. Laura

subject: Gluten free options question
snippet: Hi Kim, do you offer any gluten free holiday items? Asking for a family member.
body: Hi Kim, do you offer any gluten free holiday items this season? One of our guests has celiac and I want to bring something safe. Totally understand if the home kitchen cannot guarantee cross contact. Thanks. Devon

subject: Confirming pickup spot
snippet: Hi Kim, just confirming the usual pickup spot address for my order next week.
body: Hi Kim, just confirming the usual pickup spot for my order next week. Is it still the same address as last year? Want to make sure I have it right for my ride. Thanks so much. Tara

subject: Interested in wholesale for our cafe
snippet: Hi Kim, we run Seaside Coffee House and heard great things, would love to talk wholesale in the new year.
body: Hi Kim, this is Dmitri at Seaside Coffee House on the boardwalk. Tatiana at Cafe Nostalgia mentioned your wholesale program. We are not ready to commit but would love to talk about a standing order in the new year once the holidays settle. No rush at all. Thanks. Dmitri

subject: Holiday baking tips and new flour blends
snippet: This month, holiday laminated dough tips, a new bread flour blend, and a rugelach how to.
body: This month from the test kitchen, tips for holiday laminated dough, a note on our new high protein bread flour blend, and a step by step rugelach guide. Plus a reminder about winter shipping cutoffs. Happy baking. King Arthur Baking

subject: Weekly circular butter and spice deals
snippet: This week, unsalted butter case pricing, bulk spice specials, and extended holiday hours.
body: This week at Restaurant Depot, case pricing on unsalted butter, bulk baking spice specials, and a note that we are extending holiday hours through the end of December. See the attached circular for member specials. Restaurant Depot

subject: Brooklyn small business holiday roundup
snippet: Local maker markets, a permit reminder, and a small business grant deadline this month.
body: This month in the Brooklyn small business roundup, upcoming local maker markets, a friendly reminder to keep your permits and licenses current for the new year, and a small business grant application deadline. Best, Brooklyn Small Business Network

subject: Winter recital safety and staging notes
snippet: Recital season staging tips, injury prevention for teachers, and a costume care checklist.
body: This issue covers recital season staging tips, injury prevention reminders for teaching staff during heavy weeks, and a costume care checklist for parents. Wishing all our member studios a smooth showcase season. Dance Educators Alliance

subject: Holiday delivery schedule notice
snippet: Kim, our delivery schedule shifts the week of Dec 7, please place standing dairy orders a day early.
body: Kim, a heads up that our delivery schedule shifts slightly the week of Dec 7 for the holidays. Please place your standing dairy orders one day earlier that week so we can keep your morning windows. No change to your quantities. Thanks. Steinberg Dairy

subject: Your flour order has shipped
snippet: Kim, your recent bread flour and specialty flour order has shipped, arriving Dec 2.
body: Kim, your recent order of bread flour and specialty flours has shipped and is expected to arrive Dec 2. Tracking is attached. Payment terms net 30 as usual. Thank you for your business. King Arthur AP

subject: Following up on the rush quote
snippet: Kim, just following up, the Dec 3 rush delivery window is still open but we need your confirmation soon.
body: Kim, following up on the rush quote we sent for the Dec 3 delivery of bulk butter, bread flour, and spice restock. The window is still open but we do need your confirmation to lock it. Reply yes and we will invoice. Sales team, Restaurant Depot

subject: Reminder home kitchen license renewal due
snippet: Reminder, your NYS home kitchen license renewal for 2027 has not yet been submitted, please complete before expiry.
body: This is a courtesy reminder from NYS Department of Agriculture and Markets. Our records show your home kitchen license renewal for 2027 has been prepared but not yet submitted. Please complete and send your renewal packet before the current license expires. Reference your DocuSign envelope prepared on Nov 20. Licensing Unit

subject: Confirming Thu dinner after your session
snippet: Kim, still on for our usual Thursday dinner in the Village on Dec 10 after class? 7 pm works for me.
body: Kim, still on for our usual Thursday dinner in the Village on Dec 10? 7 pm works for me. We can debrief how the shoulder felt after the Dec 8 and Dec 10 sessions. Do not overdo it during performance week. Elena

subject: Coffee after the showcase
snippet: Kim, let us grab coffee once the showcase madness is over, no agenda, just catching up.
body: Kim, know you are buried until Dec 12 so no reply needed now. Let us grab coffee once the showcase madness is over. No agenda, just catching up. Break a leg with the dress rehearsal. David

subject: Mom and the holidays
snippet: Kim, checking in about plans with mom for the holidays, call me when you get a free minute.
body: Kim, checking in about plans with mom for the holidays. No rush, I know your December is insane. Call me Wednesday night if you get a free minute after class. Love you. Natasha

subject: Fwd recipe from church bake sale
snippet: Kimmy, forwarding this pound cake recipe from the church bake sale, thought you might like it.
body: Kimmy, forwarding this pound cake recipe from the church bake sale, thought you might like it for the shop. No pressure. See you Sunday for lunch. Love, Mom

subject: Quarterly check in scheduling
snippet: Kim, want to grab 30 minutes for a Q4 bookkeeping check in, does Dec 7 early afternoon work?
body: Kim, time for our quarterly bookkeeping check in. Does Dec 7 early afternoon work for a 30 minute call? Nothing urgent, just want to review categories before year end. QuickBooks looks tidy on my end. Marcus Webb CPA

subject: Appointment reminder Dr Orlova
snippet: Reminder, you have an annual physical with Dr Orlova, please call to schedule if not yet booked.
body: This is an automated reminder from the office of Dr Vera Orlova. Our records show you are due for your annual physical. Please call the office to schedule if you have not already. Morning slots fill quickly in December. Office of Dr V Orlova

subject: Babka for a work party
snippet: Hi Kim, could I order a couple babkas for a work party Dec 10, whatever is easiest for pickup.
body: Hi Kim, could I order a couple of chocolate babkas for a small work party on Dec 10? Whatever pickup window is easiest for you. I can fill out the Typeform if you send it. Thank you. Greg

subject: Year end sale on packaging and boxes
snippet: Save on bakery boxes, ribbon, and pastry liners through December, member pricing inside.
body: Save on bakery boxes, ribbon, and pastry liners through the end of December. Member pricing on cake boards and kraft pastry boxes. Order by Dec 15 for holiday delivery. Bakers Supply Co
